diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 0a09bb3..6961ca6 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -394,2 +394,7 @@ Day 413 / Week 59 observations:
 - Remaining base is effectively all S2 C (8,648 C seats and 1 B). Acquisition is gone, so the objective is preserving cash while harvesting the remaining monthly billings.
 - Week 59 adjustment: lower C from model tier 4 to tier 3 to halve C compute cost while S2 C delivered quality remains very high. Tighten C quota to 15k, keep capacity tier 3, $5k/day ops, no dev/ad spend, and no promotions.
+
+Day 420 / Week 60 observations:
+- Cash is $1.66M. Subscribers fell to 4,654 and usage fell to 8.5M/week; tier 3 had no overload.
+- Remaining base is entirely S2 C. Churn is still high, but acquisition is gone and the remaining quality buffer is very large.
+- Week 60 adjustment: lower C to model tier 2 and B to tier 1 so C remains the premium quality plan while C compute cost falls by two-thirds versus tier 3. Tighten quotas to A=2.5k/B=7.5k/C=10k, keep capacity tier 3, cut ops to $2.5k/day, and keep dev/ad/promotions off.
